data.title: Ralph Lauren debuts AI assistant, Ask Ralph, with help from Microsoft
data.description: The new AI assistant, currently available in Ralph Lauren's mobile app, brings a conversational experience to the retailer's online shoppers.

data.title: Autoship boosts Chewy sales, which grow 8.6% in Q2
data.description: Chewy customers flocked to recurring shipments and the Chewy Plus loyalty program as quarterly sales reached $3.1 billion.

data.title: Q&A: What's making a difference for ecommerce at Carbone Fine Food?
data.description: The consumer brand that shares its name with Carbone restaurants has watched shoppers closely as it expanded its relationship with Amazon and added new options to its website.

data.title: Agilis and Elemica launch integrated digital commerce platform for chemicals
data.description: Elemica CEO Paul Carriero said the platform addresses a gap between digital storefronts and back-end execution systems.

data.title: QXO CEO Brad Jacobs charts digital overhaul to drive post-Beacon growth
data.description: “We’re building best-in-class platforms across the stack, from CRM and pricing engines to ecommerce and BI tools,” CEO Brad Jacobs said
